name: webcomponent_api_list
description: Returns callable methods and readable properties exposed by the map-window-app public API.

sessionId.description: Optional SignalR session id. Defaults to mo-teams-app.

name: webcomponent_api_get
description: Reads a property value from the map-window-app public API.

property.description: Name of the API property to read.

sessionId.description: Optional SignalR session id. Defaults to mo-teams-app.

name: webcomponent_api_invoke
description: Invokes a method from the map-window-app public API. This can change the open map state.

method.description: Name of the API method to call.

sessionId.description: Optional SignalR session id. Defaults to mo-teams-app.

name: webcomponent_dom_event_subscribe
description: Starts capturing selected DOM events emitted by map-window-app. Use * to capture all.

eventName.description: Exact event name or * for all events.

sessionId.description: Optional SignalR session id. Defaults to mo-teams-app.
Optional SignalR session id. Defaults to mo-teams-app.

name: webcomponent_dom_event_list
description: Lists observed event names, current subscriptions and queue size.

sessionId.description: Optional SignalR session id. Defaults to mo-teams-app.

name: webcomponent_dom_event_pull
description: Reads captured events from the map-window-app MCP event queue.

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return.

clear.description: Whether returned events should be removed from the queue.

sessionId.description: Optional SignalR session id. Defaults to mo-teams-app.
